title: dungeons souls xp
description: This is a simple resource pack that turns xp into minecraft:dungeons styled souls
body:
This is a simple resource pack that turns experience into Souls inspired by those from the minecraft spinn-off game Minecraft:Dungeons.

It's made for my own use and is used on the Private SMP i play on but anyone is welcome to use it.

It's not really compatible with other texture packs that change your xp bar, such as the rainbow xp bar by VanillaTweaks.
